name: codex-speed-test-gates
description: Static A2A discovery card for the deterministic, no-LLM verification gate set of Codex-Speed-Test (a public frontend-prototyping repo: UI/sound/animation on placeholder outcomes, NO slot math, no real money). NO LIVE A2A ENDPOINT YET: this is a phase-A discovery card; the `url` points to the project repository, not a live JSON-RPC A2A endpoint (none exists in phase A). The skill below describes this repo's OWN self-verification machinery (it verifies this repo's prototypes), not a hosted service that runs on external code. See STATUS.md and docs/adr/0023-agent-interop-static-surface.md.

skills.name: Verify (deterministic preflight gate set)
skills.description: Run this repo's deterministic, no-LLM preflight gate set — lint, typecheck, unit, mutation, determinism, gate-canary (do the gates still bite?), file-guard (safety-machinery freeze), build, browser visual-regression, smoke, and a strict drift-audit — failing loud on any regression. This describes the repo's OWN self-verification machinery: it verifies this repo's frontend prototypes; it is NOT a hosted service that runs on external code. Implemented by scripts/preflight.mjs (npm run preflight).

x-lifecycle.note: Growing until explicitly frozen (see STATUS.md). Phase A is a static discovery card only: no live A2A/MCP endpoint and no authentication. A live endpoint plus machine-to-machine auth is deferred (phase B). This card describes existing self-verification machinery; it makes no claim to run on external code.
